description_long: This object consists of three tall, slender vertical poles, each topped with a pointed, dark-colored structure that appears to be an insulator or electrical component. The poles are arranged in a slightly staggered formation, with the central pole being the tallest and the two flanking poles slightly shorter. The upper sections of each pole feature cylindrical, ribbed segments, likely designed to support electrical equipment or insulators. The overall construction is metallic, with a dark, matte finish and subtle hints of reddish-brown coloration on the upper components. There are no visible crossarms, ladders, or platforms, and the design is minimalistic, focusing on verticality and functional simplicity. The asset lacks any visible signage or attached wiring.
description: A set of three tall, slender metallic poles with pointed, ribbed tops, arranged in a staggered vertical formation. The design is minimalistic, with dark, matte surfaces and no visible crossarms or signage.
description_view_0: Three vertical poles with pointed tops are visible, showing their staggered heights and ribbed upper segments.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the slim profile of the poles and the cylindrical, ribbed tops, with two poles clearly visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the staggered arrangement and pointed tops of all three poles are visible, emphasizing their height differences.
description_view_3: Direct front view of the three poles, showing their relative heights and the alignment of the ribbed upper sections.
attribute_arrangement_of_crossarms: No crossarms are present; the structure consists solely of vertical poles with ribbed tops.
attribute_configuration_of_attached_powe: No power lines are visibly attached; the poles are bare and unconnected.
